title: Podman machine ssh 'command' not working with applehv provider
body:
### Issue Description

I want to run a command inside the machine within `podman machine ssh "cmd..."`. 

As a side note `podman machine ssh` work and it connects with the machine but I just want to run the command not open a session,

This exact same command work as expected with `qemu` provider

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. export CONTAINERS_MACHINE_PROVIDER=applehv
2. podman machine init
3. podman machine start
4. podman machine ssh 'ls'


### Describe the results you received

I got an error:

```bash
Error: ls: VM does not exist
```

### Describe the results you expected

Command should be executed through the ssh and results should be shown on the output
